entries.summary: Implemented low-risk additive variability signal support for strict-inductive T3 screening: added cached nl_/sv_/pa_/fq_/hr_ variability helper, B7_v2_plus_variability baseline, and targeted/adversarial tests. No screening results run yet.
top_rejection_reasons: Initial FreeAcc/Euler plan assumption did not match cached column reality.
Test artifact initially failed to verify actual helper behavior.
Drift verifier over-applied whole-spec coverage because coverage metadata was empty.
lessons_learned: Direct cache inspection invalidated the initial FreeAcc/Euler assumption; verify feature provenance before implementation.
req_coverage reported 0/15 because files_touched metadata was empty; future phases should preserve FR-to-file mappings in evidence.
Test-engineer-reported artifacts must be verified in the workspace; an initial marker-only test was caught and replaced.
Remote GPU should be reserved for experiment execution, not small local unit/code gates.
B7 remains a screening capability only; no result should be cited until Phase 2 remote run completes.
